transcript: I came here to London because the first time I came here it was with my father and my brother and I just fell in love with the city and I decided to come here because I didn't know what to do with my life my future so I decided to do an academic year to change my environment live on my own like a challenge I hope to meet new people and discover what they like my name is Maria Zaragoza Javaloyes I I'm 18 years old and I'm from Spain. Here maybe? No, I know next to National Gallery, like around here. So we should probably go all the way. Ah, dimsum, have you heard about dimsum before? Huh? Dimsum. I haven't heard. You've never heard dimsum? What has it? Dimsum, pork, vegetables, ginger. Is it spicy? No, but it tastes good. From my point of view, I think London is a really cosmopolitan city. I can combine my interest with my studies and I love the energy of this city. I love the feeling of there's life all the time. The things that were amazing for me before are normal now or I can walk and I don't feel like I'm a tourist. I know where to go and I'm like, hey, I'm from here. Yeah, here. That's good. Yeah. To the left. I have noticed some improvements in my English, for example, in the speaking part. I wasn't good at speaking when I came here. Now I can say a lot of things without thinking about them and I'm getting used to speaking English with my friends and the people I know here. I have more confidence in myself. First I need to buy a record for my brother for Christmas present and then we can go there. Yes I think I feel at home because I've met so many people that made me feel like that. And when I came here, I didn't know how to cook, how to iron, how to do anything. But now I'm getting used to the situation and I cook pasta. It's been a good experience in my day-to-day life and also academically. It helped me change personally. I've learned many things related to studies here and I also know what I want to study, that's international relations. And now I've decided that for my future I want a job related to travelling and if it's possible I would like to work in embassies of Spain all around the world. I've decided that I will continue my studies in Spain, in my city, if it's possible. I think it will be a challenge again because you are starting something new, something different. I've created something here that makes me want to come back. I've started something, so I have to finish it.
